function.name: STXREV_GET_DOCUMENTNO
function.body:
v_documentno VARCHAR(32); BEGIN IF ( p_table_id = '4D8C3B3C31D1410DA046140C9F024D17' ) THEN -- --FIN_Finacc_Transaction SELECT coalesce (fp.documentno ,'-') INTO v_documentno FROM FIN_Finacc_Transaction ft INNER JOIN fin_payment fp on fp.fin_payment_id = ft.fin_payment_id WHERE ft.FIN_Finacc_Transaction_id = p_record_id; ELSEIF (p_table_id = 'B1B7075C46934F0A9FD4C4D0F1457B42') THEN -- FIN_Reconciliation SELECT coalesce (fr2.documentno, '-') INTO v_documentno FROM fin_reconciliation fr2 WHERE fr2.fin_reconciliation_id = p_record_id; ELSEIF (p_table_id = '4D8C3B3C31D1410DA046140C9F024D17') THEN --SSPR_Payroll SELECT coalesce(documentno, '-') INTO v_documentno FROM SSPR_Payroll WHERE SSPR_Payroll_id = p_record_id; ELSEIF (p_table_id = '224') THEN --GL_Journal SELECT coalesce(documentno, '-') INTO v_documentno FROM GL_Journal WHERE GL_Journal_Id = p_record_id; ELSEIF (p_table_id = '211492B753264EAEBE328BA4FED1F066') THEN --SSWS_WithholdingSale SELECT coalesce(documentno, '-') INTO v_documentno FROM SSWS_WithholdingSale WHERE SSWS_WithholdingSale_id = p_record_id; ELSEIF (p_table_id = '318') THEN --Invoice SELECT coalesce(documentno, '-') INTO v_documentno FROM C_Invoice WHERE C_Invoice_id = p_record_id; ELSEIF (p_table_id = 'FC1F2D243F8D4FD1B5562F9B37CECB12') THEN --ssam_alienate SELECT coalesce(documentno, '-') INTO v_documentno FROM ssam_alienate WHERE ssam_alienate_id = p_record_id; ELSEIF (p_table_id = 'D1A97202E832470285C9B1EB026D54E2') THEN --FIN_Payment SELECT coalesce(documentno, '-') INTO v_documentno FROM FIN_Payment WHERE FIN_Payment_ID = p_record_id; ELSE --SSPR_Payroll SELECT coalesce(documentno, '-') INTO v_documentno FROM SSPR_Payroll WHERE SSPR_Payroll_id = p_record_id; END IF;
RETURN v_documentno; END STXREV_GET_DOCUMENTNO
